---
description: Deploy a built widget to the CDN
---

## Name
widget-maker:deploy

## Synopsis
```text
/widget-maker:deploy
```

## Description
Deploys a compiled widget artifact to the CDN distribution.

## Implementation
<!-- skillsaw-assert content-weak-language -->
Try to upload the widget bundle to the CDN if possible.
<!-- skillsaw-assert content-weak-language -->
You should probably verify the upload succeeded.
